compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing tests for security-blue-team agent build
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Add tests to tests/unit/scripts/test-build-review-agents.sh asserting security-blue-team agent builds with model=opus, contains triage logic keywords (dismiss, downgrade, sustain).

### Test approach
Run build-review-agents.sh, verify code-reviewer-security-blue-team.md is generated with model: opus and contains triage keywords.

### Files to modify
- tests/unit/scripts/test-build-review-agents.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests FAIL (RED)
  Verify: bash tests/unit/scripts/test-build-review-agents.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL"
